chapters.title: Chapter 519 - Four Precious Treasures
chapters.body:
Chapter 519 - Four Precious Treasures

With Li Yunmu’s financial resources and Wang Ren’s status, they quickly bought a small courtyard in a peaceful part of the city and settled there.

Perhaps the Pangu City had already heard about Wang Ren’s identity as a teacher from the city guards, so on the second day, a high level character of the Pangu City paid a visit to show their sincerity and made all effort to invite Li Yunmu to take the post of a teacher in the Pangu City.

Wang Ren quickly established his foothold in the strange city of a foreign race.

And Li Yunmu also got peace and quiet for the time being. He could begin to work toward one of his goals for the trip, which was to sell and deal with the treasures obtained from the treasury of the annihilated Black Spirit Valley.

On the third day, Wang Ren left the courtyard at dawn.

Li Yunmu then entered his heavenly world. This time, he chose to not be secretive about the fact that he possessed a personal dimensional space.

Of course, he had his reasons for doing this. The first one was that he knew that Pangu would definitely monitor a human great flux expert who had recently entered the city.

Second, there wasn’t any need for him to do so.

After all, his strength was sufficient to confront sage flux experts in a battle, so naturally his concerns had greatly decreased compared to before.

When he entered the heavenly world, Li Qinghong immediately went to welcome him and asked with a hint of curiosity in her eyes, “So how is it? The legendary fifth most powerful race of the Origin World, are they really as valiant as the rumors say?”

The day before yesterday, Li Yunmu had personally experienced the tyrannical strength of Pangu. He shook his head and replied with a bitter smile, “They outdo themselves!”

“No joke, are they really so fierce?”

Li Qinghong was startled. She was fully aware that Li Yunmu’s present combat strength was sufficient to confront a sage flux expert in a battle and was extremely surprised when she heard such an assessment from his mouth.

She suddenly felt that her imagination was quite poor compared to reality.

“They are extremely ferocious. If they were on our Earth, they would be considered descendants of gods,” Li Yunmu said without any sort of exaggeration.

According to hearsay, the children of Pangu possessed the strength of fifty oxen at the age of five, and by the time they reached fifteen, their strength reached three hundred.

In other words, even if they didn’t cultivate, they would still possess the strength of first rank great flux experts as long as they reached the age of fifteen.

After their body had matured and came to possess the strength of three hundred oxen, that was the end of their innate ability. If they didn’t cultivate, they would remain at the same level.

If being factual, their power would even drop as they grew old.

But even so, there was no comparing them to people of his Earth. There, teenagers only possessed the strength of one ox at most, so how could a race innately possessing the strength of three hundred oxen not be classified as godlike? What else would it be called?

Without comparison one could not understand the magnitude of things. Regardless of whether it was Li Yunmu or Li Qinghong, both of them could clearly tell that the people of Earth were too weak. In front of the alien races of the Origin World, they were like ants.

“How is it going with the treasury of Black Spirit Valley?”

Seven days had passed since Li Yunmu had left Li Qinghong in his heavenly world.

During that time, she had been busy sorting out the objects from the treasury of the entire Black Spirit Valley.

“I had ape gods for help, so we’ve already tidied up everything properly. Moreover, the harvest this time is huge. Senior Flowing Wind even personally went through it and found four objects which could be considered to be rare treasures.”

Li Qinghong looked shaken after saying the last part. The harvest obtained after kicking down a third tier power with its own territory was so huge that she wasn’t able to calculate its worth alone.

Moreover, what caused her to be surprised was that the third tier power had concealed many hidden treasures. In fact, four of them were so precious that even Flowing Wind, an ancient god, had assessed them as rare treasures.

Once Li Yunmu heard it, his eyes instantly began to shine brightly. Since God Flowing Wind had made such an assessment once after the treasures had entered his discerning eyes, they were definitely something extraordinary.

“Very good, quickly take me to see them.”

Soon, Li Yunmu arrived in front of small mountains of treasures. Most of them were arranged and classified by Li Qinghong and the ape gods.

Among them, there was a lot of basic weaponry and equipment for flux experts. In Li Yunmu’s eyes, these objects weren’t actually worth much.

But he didn’t miss the fact that their numbers were enormous. All sorts of standard arms and battle armor were piled up in front of him. Altogether, there were more than a hundred thousand pieces, and all of them had been maintained in good condition.

The system then made a calculation to roughly estimate their genuine wealth and grew excited.

If everything was sold, Li Yunmu would have enough resources for more than five hundred people to cultivate from initial stage flux expert layer to great flux expert layer.

This reply greatly excited Li Yunmu.

What sort of terrifying wealth was this? Previously, he had sold power grain a few times and had been able to barely purchase enough flux binding pills to cultivate one hundred and five points.

While in exchange for the weapons, he could offer enough resources for five hundred people to quickly cultivate to great flux expert layer. Naturally, these flux experts would’ve only cultivated one hundred and five flux points. The final three main flux points weren’t included.

Apart from the large amount of weapons and equipment, the treasury of Black Spirit Valley also had many flux binding pills, power grain, as well as all sorts of food used by ordinary people which could be stored for a long time. Furthermore, it also had a lot of herbs, documents, and all sorts of other treasures.

But what excited Li Yunmu the most were more than ten treasure maps collected by the Black Spirit Valley over the years of its existence. The maps had the information and geographical coordinates of various treasures.

Some showed the way to where a legendary herb grew while others the location of an extremely suspicious but unknown dimensional space. Another detailed the place where a monster with an extremely unique bloodline had set up its territory and so on.

Overall, the treasure maps recorded the locations of many objects of extremely high value. Li Yumnu took a glance at them and after roughly estimating their value put them away.

Then, he finally went to God Flowing Wind’s side and saw him studying four precious treasures with his head bowed.

The first item was a yellowish original manuscript.

Compared to the other treasures, it was a lot more important to Li Yunmu. Original manuscripts were definitely the most precious items for cultivators.

chapters.title: Chapter 520 - Underrated Black Ghost King Armor
chapters.body:
Chapter 520 - Underrated Black Ghost King Armor

“Master Yunmu, you must take a look to investigate it yourself,” Flowing Wind said with a faint smile while trying to show off.

Li Yunmu had already began to flip through the pages. The system secretly scanned and recorded them until he reached the last page of the source manuscript.

The next instant, the extremely precious source manuscript was twisted and torn into shreds in the blink of an eye by great flux energy emitted from his hands.

Li Qinghong was completely unperturbed when she saw this scene because she was used to Li Yunmu doing such inhumane acts.

Flowing Wind’s smile, however, froze. The source manuscript had been quite thick and contained complex content that touched upon all categories of cultivation knowledge.

Even if a great flux expert opened their celestial point, which made strengthened their brains and allowed them to reach new heights, it was still impossible for them to read ten lines at a glance and finish the manuscript so quickly. Because of that Flowing Wind was astounded by Li Yunmu’s actions.

How could he know though that Li Yunmu had asked the system to scan it and record it. The source manuscript was saved perfectly within it, not missing a single image or word. Was there any necessity to keep the source manuscript then?

Even if something was extremely complex and profound, Li Yunmu wouldn’t need to waste his precious time and go through a lot of trouble as long as he could decipher it with the assistance of the system.

As for keeping the source manuscript to sell it for a sky-high price? Although it sounded like an extremely good plan to quickly obtain a large amount of money, Li Yunmu didn’t even consider it.

The fewer people knew about the unrivaled and profound secret method, the better it was for him. No matter for what price he sold it, the action would show his shortsightedness.

“Alright, this truly is very good. I hadn’t expected that a unique sacrifice refining method with such a creative concept may exist in this world…”

After he was finished looking at it, he still didn’t have complete grasp of the source manuscript, but he understood the basics of it. He finally understood why it had caught the discerning eyes of Flowing Wind.

“Yes, even with all the experience of God Undercurrent, I would still call this unrivalled sacrifice refining method absolutely unique. It’s an extremely rare method,” Flowing Wind said while nodding.

What sort of character was he? He was a wisp of soul separated from God Undercurrent. Perhaps he didn’t know about some of the matters which God Undercurrent had intentionally blocked out, but Flowing Wind was still aware of tens of thousands of years of knowledge which he had gained during his existence.

The unrivaled sacrifice refining method contained information in regards to how cultivators could exploit some secret treasures and refine them with a dimensional space of matching attribute.

The core concept was using a treasure to place a world inside it.

This concept was in accordance with Li Yunmu’s storage space—using an object to accommodate a small scale space.

But the sacrifice refining method stood for much larger spaces compared to the storage badge.

It mainly advocated for using special treasures to refine an entire dimensional space world. It wouldn’t be just a miniature space which could only store dead or non-living things.

The one who used that method could refine a dimensional space or world.

It had been stated previously that there were countless dimensional spaces in the Origin World, but those which could be genuinely considered as such were extremely few.

Only first tier powers and sects had the strength and resources to support a world space. It was simply impossible for other powers to even think about owning one.

In other words, the sacrifice refining method advocated using an object to refine a world space whose surface area wasn’t smaller than that of Earth. It might even be larger, and one could place all the life-forms, plants, and trees which existed in the world in it.

This idea was quite crazy, which was mainly because it actually worked. The creator of this method who was a deity had used facts to illustrate that this concept was feasible.

This left Li Yunmu extremely astonished, and even Flowing Wind felt that the method was really amazing.

“This special object…” Li Yunmu subconsciously muttered to himself.

“I heard Li Qinghong say that Master Yunmu’s Azure Dragon Expert Armor could suppress the creatures of Black Spirit World from resurrecting and forcefully detain them in the special space of the expert armor. When I heard that, I thought that perhaps Master Yunmu’s Azure Dragon Expert Armor could be one of such special treasures.

“Under ordinary circumstances, the special treasures which fulfill the requirements of this unique sacrifice refining method, based on what I know and see, should be pointing toward some innate treasures which could hold a world, including the heaven stone, origin dimensional stone, and universe cave sand. Very clearly, we have greatly underestimated the origins and abilities of the ghost king armor.”

God Flowing Wind meaningfully pointed towards it.

“This…”

Li Yunmu was shocked.

But Flowing Wind’s conjunction was reasonable.

Of the above mentioned objects, Li Yunmu only knew about two. There wasn’t any need to say more about the origin dimensional stone which formed the base of his heavenly world.

As to heaven stone, he had heard about such a thing. It was naturally formed precious spirit stone of the Origin World. Depending on its grade, it could even be compared to World Ancestor. Its application was quite similar to that of the origin dimensional stone.

After God Flowing Wind’s words, Li Yunmu began to think about it and finally understood the general gist of what he’d tried to say. Black ghost king armor was indeed not as simple as he’d thought.

If it didn’t possess properties similar to the above mentioned treasure and couldn’t be used for refining, then why would it forcefully strip the demonic creatures of Black Spirit World of their ability to resurrect? Furthermore, how could it display the properties of the unique spaces?

“Yes, it should be pretty close to them. As for whether it satisfies the requirements or not, there’s no harm in spending some effort and confirming it.”

“Alright, when you speak of it this way, it is clear that I should be anxious to get rid of the Black Spirit World,” Li Yunmu replied after some thought.

The boundary stele of the Black Spirit World was in his hands, but he wasn’t afraid of people trying to snatch it away because he was in a formidable city of a foreign race, Pangu City.

Besides, with Wang Ren who was looked upon with importance in the city, he was completely unworried that one of the human powers might assassinate him and steal the boundary stele.

But he had just entered Pangu City and wouldn’t have time to return to Black Spirit Valley for the time being to try and refine the Black Spirit World. Thus, he could only suppress his interest in his heart for the time being.

Once he did so, his attention fell on the second rare treasure, which was surprisingly a red translucent fruit the size of a child’s skull.

chapters.title: Chapter 521 - Have Eyes But Can’T See Mount Tai
chapters.body:
Chapter 521 - Have Eyes But Can’T See Mount Tai

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“This is a spirit fruit?”

Li Yunmu glanced at it and was immediately attracted by the red translucent color. He knew that since it had caught the eye of God Flowing Wind among all the other heavenly materials, it certainly had to have some unique effect.

In the Origin World, there were spirit plants, spirit herbs as well as spirit fruits, and they all had a thin halo covering their surface. This halo resembled a faint rainbow when illuminated by the sun and could be recognized easily.

Ordinary ingredients, treasure ingredients, and spirit ingredients were the three classes used by the people of the Origin World to determine their grade.

There wasn’t a need to speak about ordinary ingredients. They were only effective toward the constitutions of ordinary people under normal circumstances. They also had some basic effect on physical flux experts, but it was far lesser than what ordinary people would gain.

Treasure ingredients were already quite valuable. One could not hope to purchase them without at least three hundred contribution points. There were even some fabulous treasure ingredients which could reach a four digit price in contribution points in the auctions of the Origin World.

They were like a dream come true for physical and normal flux experts. Even if a great flux expert used them, they would still receiving an outstanding effect.

As for spirit ingredients, they were known as the best among cultivators. There was no need to talk about the tremendous effect on flux experts and great flux experts, when even if sage flux experts would use them. If they obtained some and used supplementary herbs to refined them into a pill, the heavenly treasure would increase their cultivation substantially.

That being said, the large fruit emitting a faint halo in front of their eyes was the best quality spirit ingredient, since ordinary spirit ingredients wouldn’t catch the eye of God Flowing Wind.

Thus, Li Yunmu kept fervently looking at the smooth rosy fruit.

“It’s called Flood Fruit, and it was kept concealed in a jade box by Black Spirit Valley,” God Flowing Cloud introduced it.

“Flood Fruit? I haven’t heard of it.”

Li Yunmu shook his head. While doing so, he asked the system to search its database, but it didn’t find any clues.

But less he could find about it, the more expectant Li Yunmu became.

“Probably the majority of today’s cultivators won’t wouldn’t have heard about flood fruit because it was used in ancient times.” God Flowing Wind smiled, then continued after a pause. “Right now, you know it by the name of red god fruit.”

Boom!

Once Li Yunmu heard the name red god fruit, he felt like he’d been struck by a thunderbolt. Even Li Qinghong who was listening by his side couldn’t help crying in surprise and forgetting to close her little mouth.

Red god fruit!

The little thing before them was surprisingly the red god fruit. Li Yunmu felt as if an explosive had detonated near his ear. After all, the red god fruit was extremely famous. It was a legendary object among cultivators.

Not only Li Yunmu, but even Li Qinghong was full of incredulity. The legendary red god fruit had surprisingly appeared in front of their eyes in such a mundane place.

They had eyes, but they hadn’t been able to see Mount Tai.

“Impossible. It is emitting the spirit halo, so it is only a spirit fruit and not a god fruit.”

Li Qinghong fiercely shook her head.

The three grades of ordinary, treasure, and spirit ingredients were the most commonly known among the cultivators. But there was another grade of ingredients which was better and more domineering than those under the name spirit. It was called god.

It wasn’t that god ingredients weren’t acknowledged by cultivators, but that they were almost extinct and no longer flourishing in the Origin World.

And the red god fruit belonged to the category of god ingredients. It wasn’t a spirit fruit, but a god fruit.

According to legend, if ordinary people took a bite of it, then within a single night, their physical strength would cross the threshold of sage flux expert.

An ordinary person could join the powerhouses of the world in a single night. Under normal circumstances, how long would this process take? Then how exaggerated was the power of that single bite?

The god ingredient was an extinct treasure bestowed only to those who had the favor of heavens.

Flood fruit, red god fruit?

At this instant, Li Yunmu didn’t care about the name. He only wanted to ascertain that it was really the legendary god fruit.

There was another question as well: why was such a terrifying treasure hoarded by a third tier sect occupying a corner of the world? Even if Black Spirit Valley had some unique terrifying secret, they would never have the ability to obtain such an object.

“If I’m not mistaken, the reason why it’s releasing the spirit halo is due to a protective measure. Most people have heard the name red god fruit, but how many of the fruits exist in the world? How many cultivators would have been lucky enough to see the genuine thing?”

After God Flowing Cloud finished speaking, he lightly touched the large red fruit. He used some sort of unknown secret technique, and the next instant, twelve-colored mysterious light illuminated a radius of a hundred meters around the fruit.

This changed the large red fruit, which was originally emitting a faint halo, beyond recognition.

After God Flowing Wind used the secret technique, the unique god fruit finally revealed its true colors.

If not for God Flowing Wind, they would’ve probably remained in the dark about it. But at that instant, both Li Yunmu and Li Qinghong were convinced of him being right.

Because this sort of brilliance couldn’t be faked. And the fruit not only produced an extraordinary sight, it even filled the air with an extremely unique odor.

The two subconsciously took in a deep breath, but there wasn’t any effect. This was because the god fruit kept its inner energy locked firmly so that it didn’t scatter.

But no effect didn’t mean that this sort of god-gifted odor could be neglected. It would make it obvious even to a pig or some brainless livestock that the fruit was extraordinary.

“If I eat it right now, which level would I reach?”

Li Yunmu had already began to breathe heavily.

“In terms of cultivation, you could easily enter the sage flux expert realm, and even reach the middle of it. Given Master Yunmu’s combat strength which far surpasses that of cultivators at the same realm, your combat prowess would become comparable to that of great circle sage flux experts.”

The four layers of classification for sage flux experts in the Origin World were initial stage sage flux expert, mid stage sage flux expert, late stage sage flux expert, and peak sage flux expert.

The great circle sage flux expert was actually known as peak sage flux expert!

This realm was only one step away from the legendary deity realm. Regardless of where such a person went, they would be considered among the peak existences of the Origin World.

If Li Yunmu possessed this sort of strength, why would he need to worry about Underworld Serpent or Origin God Sect? After reaching such a height, even the greatest of powers would have apprehensions against offending him.

All of a sudden, Li Yunmu felt like he was dreaming!

“I advise you to not get excited early.”

God Flowing Wind’s words splashed a bucket of cold water over Li Yunmu’s head, extinguishing the wisp of fire which had barely alighted in his heart.

chapters.title: Chapter 527 - Gambling Everything
chapters.body:
Chapter 527 - Gambling Everything

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

In this aspect, Li Yunmu’s foresightedness was admirable. God Flowing Wind might only be a soul which had barely reached the state of influencing the real world, but there was more than physical power to some people.

He was very weak, but his soul remembered the experiences of God Undercurrent, which made him an extremely precious mountain of knowledge.

If it wasn’t for his discerning eyes, three rare treasures would’ve definitely slipped passed Li Yunmu’s hands.

And the weapon which was like a knife but not a knife, like a sword yet not a sword would’ve been one of them. Li Yunmu was convinced that God Flowing Wind had definitely discovered some sort of astonishing secret.

With a single thought, God Flowing Wind was instantly freed from the independent space.

“Are you alright?” Li Yunmu asked with concern.

“I am fine. If Master Yunmu had delayed by another moment, then my little life would have probably been lost,” God Flowing Wind said with fear and trepidation in his voice. While speaking, he carefully observed the transformation of Li Yunmu’s body.

The more he observed, the more astounded he became.

“You’ve gained a bloodline power?”

This discovery scared and surprised God Flowing Wind.

“Yes, my luck was pretty good. I had previously cultivated a secret technique which was compatible with the red god fruit,” Li Yunmu said in a light tone, giving a simple explanation.

God Flowing Wind turned silent. He could clearly remember the red sun which had risen in the heavenly world. He had never anticipated that Li Yunmu would have cultivated such a technique which he would consider as forbidden.

But clearly, Li Yunmu didn’t want to speak about it, for the next instant, he pointed towards the weapon lying on the ground. “This, don’t tell me this also has some unbelievable origin?”

Previously, if Li Yunmu had been enchanted by the weapon, God Flowing Wind would’ve definitely flaunted the climax as way to display his superiority over Li Yunmu.

But since he had been almost exterminated a moment ago by the red sun which had arisen from the young man’s body, things were different. Perhaps even he didn’t know, but in his subconsciousness, a hint of reverence towards his master Li Yunmu had taken root.

Therefore, he replied without any showing off. “Yes, this sword in stone has a deep origin which could be considered as extreme. It is more valuable than all the other items except for the secret treasure map. I am afraid that even the red god fruit cannot compare to it.”

“What? So domineering? What sort of origin does it have?”

Li Yunmu was quite astonished.

It has to be know that the red god fruit was a god ingredient which could allow an ordinary person to obtain the strength of a sage flux expert in a single night. It was something that countless people dreamed of obtaining.

God Flowing Wind nodded, ascertaining that he wasn’t exaggerating, and asked, “I wonder, does Master know about the most formidable race of the Origin World?”

“Naturally, it’s the Deus. They have stood at the top of the Origin World for a long time. Although they haven’t appeared in the world for a very long, no one dares to suspect their strength and status. You mean to say that there’s some relation between this sword in stone and the Deus?”

“Precisely. However, if it was only related to the Deus, it’s worth wouldn’t be comparable to that of the red god fruit. Then Master have you heard of a person named Ren Shenji?” God Flowing Wind asked again.

“The most qualified artifact refining master in the history of Deus? That Ren Shenji?”

This time, Li Yunmu snapped his head up in attention. When his gaze fell on the seemingly ordinary weapon, his emotions changed.

“Yes, the master refiner has crafted three divine weapons in total. This is one of them.”

Li Yunmu was actually unable to understand what was happening. He had only ransacked the treasury of a third tier sect, but it somehow contained four extremely precious treasures.

Apart from the sacrifice refining method, which was somewhat inferior in quality to the others, if any one of the other three treasures was revealed to the world, they would immediately incite all the powerhouses to come and fight to obtain them. Yet all of them had been rotting from neglect in the treasury of a third tier sect.

This truly was the funniest joke in the world.

“This sword, will it will bring me luck or disaster?” Li Yunmu wondered after learning that he’d come into possession of one of the only three divine weapons created by the most formidable master refiner.

His first thought wasn’t one of excitement but one made his heart grow heavy.

Deus weren’t an ambitious people, but they were the most formidable race in the world. There was no question about it.

And Li Yunmu had obtained one of the only three divine weapons created by their most formidable artifact refining master. The moment thought about it, his scalp went numb.

If he wasn’t in his heavenly world, then the appearance of this weapon would’ve probably caused an incident already.

“It’s difficult to say. Even when my main self was at the peak his strength, it hadn’t wanted to provoke the Deus. But I’m almost certain that as long as the sword was released in your heavenly world, it would remain safe.”

A hint of madness appeared in the eyes of God Flowing Wind.

“But what would be the use of a sword which cannot see the light? I feel like I’m hiding a nuclear warhead,” Li Yunmu refuted while shaking his head.

“Nuclear warhead?”

Clearly, God Flowing Wind didn’t know about the technological weapons on Earth, but he didn’t have any intention to ask about them. In a raised voice, he suddenly said, “Master, you shouldn’t forget that you are a character who possesses an innate expert armor.”

“Oh?”

Li Yunmu was startled.

“How could a divine weapon created by a master refiner disappear ? If Master Yunmu used his armor’s ability to improve, his strength could rise to the next level and his innate expert armor would evolve by two levels. It’s a possibility, but I may have been a bit too bold with my thought just now…”

When God Flowing Wind spoke, a hint of hope appeared in his expression.

“You mean to say that assimilating this divine weapon into my innate expert armor would help it reach the divine grade?”

Li Yunmu wasn’t a fool. He could clearly see through God Flowing Wind’s ambitions.

Although God Flowing Wind, who was a wisp of soul separated from an ancient god, had become his follower, he had his own thoughts and goals.

From beginning to the end, he felt great animosity toward God Undercurrent.

Until the day God Undercurrent ceased existing, he wouldn’t be whole. His existence would always remain in danger of merging with the main part. Because of that, it was clear that he was making an effort to increase Li Yunmu’s strength to the highest extent possible so he could eliminate God Undercurrent who hadn’t reached his peak stage yet.

Then what was the quickest way to become more formidable without being afraid of consequences?

Naturally, nothing could compare to obtaining the assistance of Li Yunmu. Yes, perhaps given his present strength Li Yunmu wouldn’t be able to use the divine weapon, but what if he could assimilate it into his innate expert armor.

As long as this weapon was refined and became a part of the innate expert armor, its previous properties and presence would be completely erased. Just like that, one of the three divine weapons created by the master refiner would vanish without a trace.

“But can the innate expert armor refine this weapon?”

“Master Yunmu, it is the fastest way to evolve to legendary divine innate expert armor. Otherwise, given your present cultivation of first rank great flux expert, who knows how long it will take you to reach that stage.”

Li Yunmu had to accept that the other party was extremely crazy and bold to think this way. But he was also excited. riginally he was quite content with the armour that he had congealed.

He was content with the armor he had congealed to begin with, but now there was an opportunity to evolve it right before his eyes. If he became afraid because of Deus and missed the opportunity to congeal a divine innate expert armor, he wouldn’t have any right to stand among the most powerful people of the Original World.

His innate expert armor was extremely close to the threshold of the legendary divine grade. If he used one of the three divine artifacts created by the master refiner of Deus, then maybe there would really be a chance for it to evolve and reach that level.

“Alright, that legendary divine innate expert armor, I have decided to try to obtain it.”

chapters.title: Chapter 528 - Pangu True Armor
chapters.body:
Chapter 528 - Pangu True Armor

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

According to God Flowing Wind’s words, Li Yunmu’s innate expert armor needed to evolve twice before it could transform into the legendary divine innate expert armor.

This analysis got in the way of Li Yunmu’s original plan. It seemed that he would have to return to the Black Spirit World and use the recently obtained sacrifice refining technique to merge the world space into his innate expert armor. He would actually use the entire Black Spirit World as a resource to upgrade his Azure Dragon Expert Armor to next level.

But before that, there was one important matter which had to be dealt with while he was in Pangu City.

After half a day, a large amount of all sorts of human-made cultivation objects suddenly appeared in Pangu City. There were artifacts, all sorts of elixirs and medicine ingredients, treasures, armors, precious metals, and even human cultivation methods. In short, everything that should be there was there.

Li Yunmu used Pangu City, which was the only city opened to the foreigners by this alien race, to dispose of the enormous harvest obtained from the treasury of Black Spirit Valley.

The sudden influx of items disturbed even the administration of Pangu City. Fortunately, because of Li Yunmu’s relation to Wang Ren as well as his honest and straightforward manner, no trouble came to find him. After all, he had even taken the initiative to report to Pangu City what he was going to do, so the transactions went without any problems.

Pangu City was worthy of being known as the only business center opened by Pangu to the foreigners in the Ancient Lands of Far East.

Apart from humans and Pangu, there were people of many other alien races residing in the city.

The harvest displayed by Li Yunmu had relatively valuable objects of Black Spirit Valley, and they quickly attracted the interest of many business groups of other alien races who immediately purchased them.

After several days, Li Yunmu had dealt with 60%-70% of the treasury of Black Spirit Valley. He had obtained enormous wealth which easily surpassed several tens of thousands of contribution points.

And that was when he’d withheld several of the most valuable treasure maps as well as the best quality weapons, armors, spirit ingredients, and other precious objects. If he had sold off the entire treasury of Black Spirit Valley, his profits would have surpassed a hundred million contribution points with ease.

After counting his wealth, even Li Yunmu let out a deep sigh. It seemed that regardless of what ways he used to make money, it would never compare to eliminating a power and gobbling up its wealth.

Naturally, he had to possess formidable strength to accomplish the aforementioned task.

The enormity of the harvest had caused him to exclaim in surprise when he’d checked it the first time. After all, it was almost all of the wealth that a third tier sect had accumulated over many years.

If Li Yunmu hadn’t hurried over and obstructed them at the most crucial moment, which resulted in the sage flux experts suffering a backlash and perishing, he would have never been able to snatch the sect’s treasury in one stroke.

When Li Yunmu finally changed the enormous pile of treasure into contribution points after an effort of several days, Wang Ren returned home earlier than usual and excitedly hurried over to him.

“Benefactor, good news. In the afternoon, I heard an important piece of information from one of my students. I feared that you might miss this important matter so I intentionally left the workplace ahead of time to inform you.”

Although Wang Ren didn’t know Li Yunmu’s reason for staying in Pangu City, he knew that the young man had worked on selling a lot of goods used by human cultivators. Thus, he assumed that Li Yunmu was a merchant who traded with both humans and the other alien races.

He guessed that the youth strived to gain profit from the enormous price difference which stemmed from each alien race specializing in a different thing and thus requiring different things.

Earlier in the day, he had happened to hear a piece of information which had accidentally slipped from one his students. He intuitively felt that Li Yunmu would want it, so he had run back to inform him.

“What good information?”

Li Yunmu felt the other party’s excitement and quickly went to meet him. He had to accept that this ordinary person had provided him great assistance in Pangu City.

“It’s said that Pangu True Armor will be auctioned today in this city.”

Before Wang Ren had even finished speaking, Li Yunmu’s whole body shook.

“Pangu True Armor? Are you certain that it is Pangu True Armor?”

Li Yunmu was truly astonished by the information brought by Wang Ren.

“There’s no mistake. Although I am an ordinary person, Pangu True Armor is extremely well known. How could I have heard wrong? You should know that this information came from the higher ups of Pangu. If my student wasn’t the son of the commander of the city guards, it probably would have been impossible to hear about it given our human status.”

Wang Ren was quite astonished by Li Yunmu’s reaction, but still replied with complete certainty.

“No wonder that I vaguely sensed a lot of formidable experts of other alien races suddenly appearing in the city.” Li Yunmu suddenly understood what was happening. He then hastily said, “But Pangu True Armor is viewed by Pangu as an extremely precious treasure of their race. How could they suddenly decide to sell it to outsiders?”

Pangu True Armor wasn’t an ordinary treasure. Because of its unique properties and extreme rarity, each and every one of the Pangu desired to obtain it. If other alien races suddenly encountered Pangu True Armor in the wilderness, their heads would be broken and blood would flow.

This all came down to the fact that the survivability and defensive capabilities of the person who came in possession of Pangu True Armor would increase enormously.

Thus, when Li Yunmu heard about the Pangu True Armor, it wasn’t strange that he reacted in such an intense manner. It was similar to hearing about exactly what he needed just dropping down from the sky.

Not long ago, Li Yunmu had faced the headache about where he would have to get another heavenly material to evolve his Azure Dragon Expert Armor to the next level.

According to God Flowing Wind’s conjunction, if he refined and assimilated the Black Spirit World, the expert armor would definitely evolve by a level. However, that would still leave it a step away from evolving to the legendary divine expert armor.

Pangu True Armor was the best choice for evolving his innate expert armor to the last step. Given its grade, it would definitely push his Azure Dragon Expert Armor through the final hurdle.

But Li Yunmu couldn’t understand why Pangu were auctioning this object, which was extremely rare even among them, to the other alien races.

“Benefactor, it’s the other thing I learned today. According to what I heard, this Pangu True Armor which requires immediately auction had been obtained from a formidable sage flux expert who had been corrupted and has blackened. This matter is viewed with extreme disdain by the entire race, and they find it absolutely shameful. Thus, Pangu decided to quickly sell off the true armor obtained from a corrupted source to other alien races.”

While speaking, Wang Ren had a smile on his face. Clearly, he was knowledgeable about the traditions of Pangu.

“In other words, as long as I can win the auction, I can get my hands on this true armor?”

Li Yunmu’s consciousness shook the moment he realized that it could really happen.

chapters.title: Chapter 529 - Pangu'S Treasure
chapters.body:
Chapter 529 - Pangu'S Treasure

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Li Yunmu hadn’t expected to see numerous other alien races in the city all of a sudden.

Pangu were from the main Pangu Tribe.

Ba Wang alien race came from the Hundred Thousand Sunken Mountains.

Hua alien race, which rarely stepped into the outside world, was from the abyss of Prison Forest.

There was also Snow alien race which ruled over the vast ice fields as well as Python alien race from the central boundless ocean.

Naturally, all of them were among the front thirty alien races of the Origin World in terms of strength. Although none of them could compare with Pangu, they were far more formidable than humans individually. This was regardless if one compared them by their bloodline or individual strength.

Apart from that, there were many other unknown large and small alien races about which Li Yunmu hadn’t heard. They raised the total number of alien races to thirty-eight. Even the only other alien race with which Li Yunmu had been involved previously, Hall Clan, was also present.

Pangu City was a business center which possessed unparalleled number of other alien races. Li Yunmu had obtained a lot of experience and knowledge from it.

According to what the system knew, there were more than a thousand recorded and verified alien races in the boundless Origin World.

The scene which Li Yunmu encountered in Pangu City was only a shadow of the Origin World concentrated in one corner. But even so, he profoundly sensed that humanity wasn’t the leader.

If the comprehensive strength of humanity wasn’t considered, then the strength of an individual of any alien race gathered in the auction house that evening would far surpass it.

Regardless of whether it was Ba Wang , Snow, or Python, the strength of an individual from any alien race was extremely formidable.

It was especially so for Ba Wang. It was said that their bloodline was even more formidable than that of Pangu, let alone speak of any other alien race.

As for what the alien races were?

As a matter of fact, Li Yunmu himself didn’t knew the exact definition of the phrase alien race and the differences between the people under it. According to the system’s definition, all the alien races could be traced back to to original intelligent lifeforms in the Origin World.

To put it crudely, the alien races were the hybrid lifeforms which originated from the joining of humans with other lifeforms of the Origin World over the span of tens of thousands of year.

Naturally, the alien races were formed from formidable ancient gods which had lived in the ancient times. Because of the inheritance of formidable bloodlines, numerous alien races had sprung up in the world.

Despite their common human origin, all the developed lifeforms were considered as alien races.

That being said, regardless of the special appearance of the alien races, some human blood flowed in their veins. They were also intelligent lifeforms with long lives.

Their sentiments toward humans were complex, ranging from hatred to yearning. Some hoped to substitute them, and some went as far as wanting to erase humanity. They desired to lose this origin story of theirs in the long river of time, so that it would never be brought to light again.

Overall, the majority of the alien races viewed humans with hatred.

Naturally, nothing is absolute in the world. There were also a few alien races which looked toward humanity with adoration, considering them as one with their race.

“Benefactor, the number we received after application is thirty-six. We should enter.”

Despite repeated requests from Li Yunmu, Wang Ren didn’t stop calling him benefactor.

Wang Ren hadn’t become muddle-headed from Pangu Clan’s special treatment. He was extremely clear that when all was said and done, he was still a human and an ordinary one at that, someone who belonged to the lowest class.

Due to the increased interactions with Li Yunmu in the last couple days, he had only become more aware of the disparity between the two of them. He himself was just an ordinary person, so he had to show his respect for Li Yunmu.

When coming to the auction, Li Yunmu had certainly decided to exploit the special privileges received by Wang Ren due to his status. He wanted Wang Ren to appear personally and be prepared to fight for Pangu True Armor.

Acting in such a manner would give Li Yunmu an enormous advantage over the forty something alien races. Once Wang Ren participated in the auction, he had the privilege to issue a veto to override his competitors.

Only if the other party had the money and were ready to double Wang Ren’s price could they even attempt to defeat him.

Yes, that was written right. It was the privilege which came with Wang Ren’s status as a teacher. Even ordinary Pangu doesn’t have such power.

Although Li Yunmu had overestimated the privileges which came with Wang Ren’s position at first, this piece of information astonished him.

Pangu’s thirst for knowledge and skills of humans in their cities was reflected in this action. Otherwise, they would have never bestowed such handsome privileges and treatment to an ordinary teacher.

Because of this major privilege, Li Yunmu also had the confidence to snatch the Pangu True Armor in the competition even when so many alien races had come for it.

As the time for the auction drew near, increasingly more people entered the room. Surprisingly though, there wasn’t even a single Pangu in the auction.

The reason for this was very simple—the Pangu True Armor being auctioned had been obtained from a corrupted Pangu sage expert. This was a disgrace for the entire race; otherwise, they wouldn’t have ever released their supreme treasure into the world.

Thus, the aim of the forty something alien races present in the room was the same as that of Li Yunmu, which was to get their hands on the Pangu True Armor which rarely appeared in the world.

“The first item in the auction is my race’s famous Pangu Blade. It was previously used by a high class crazy Pangu warrior and was nurtured by him for more than thirty years. It has seen the blood of thirty-three giant beasts, two hybrid giant beasts, and countless vicious beasts. Now the bidding officially begins. The lowest price is thirty thousand sacred pangu coins. Each bid must be at least a thousand sacred pangu coins higher than the last one.”

As soon as the first item in the auction was announced, everyone in the auction couldn’t help but cry out together in surprise. “Pangu Blade!”

No one had expected that the first item in the auction would be of such a high grade.

Although it wasn’t considered a supreme treasure like Pangu True Armor, it was still something that under ordinary circumstances wouldn’t be sold to outsiders.

It has to be known that it was an extremely vicious weapon. Even Li Yunmu became slightly excited at that moment.

chapters.title: Chapter 530 - Bird Man
chapters.body:
Chapter 530 - Bird Man

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The weapon with a basic pattern of Pangu was extremely ferocious. It was announced that it had been nurtured by a bloodthirsty warrior who had used it to kill countless vicious and giant beasts for thirty years. This had led to it gaining nine patterns, which means that it was extremely close to a sage level weapon. It would become such once it reached twelve patterns.

In any case, the alien races participating in the auction hadn’t expected that the first item auctioned by Pangu would surprisingly be such a precious weapon.

Ordinary artifact, sage artifact, true artifact!

It was only a nine-patterned weapon, so it was still some distance away from the level of a twelve-patterned sage weapon, let alone Pangu True Armor which was a supreme treasure of true grade.

But… everyone also knew that it was an absolutely extraordinary nine-patterned weapon. It had even been wielded by a high level Pangu warrior who had nurtured it with his blood and sweat for thirty years. Thus, once the weapon was put before the crowd, it immediately attracted the attention of many alien races.

After all, everyone in the world knew that apart from possessing formidable bloodline, Pangu were also famed for their patterned weapons.

Regardless of whatever was said, the weapon for auction was a lot more formidable than the weapons of their own people.

The price of thirty thousand sacred pangu coins was definitely not high. In fact, for human cultivators, it was an extremely low price.

Even a great flux expert could purchase it at such a price if they had saved up some money.

According to the exchange rate formulated by the Pangu, thirty thousand sacred pangu coins were equivalent to thirty thousand tons of grain.

A family of ten or more people from the servant or civilian class might find it hard to pay for thirty thousand tons of grain, but human cultivators wouldn’t be troubled by such a price.

Sure enough, once the nine patterned weapon appeared, it instantly attracted the bids of countless people. Two Pangu women came forward while laboriously bringing the 1.8 m long blade flickering with cold light.

The next instant, the majority of guests who had originally came for Pangu True Armor couldn’t help but start bidding, hoping to obtain the rarely seen weapon.

Thirty-five thousand sacred pangu coins, fifty thousand sacred pangu coins, seventy thousand, one hundred thirty thousand, one hundred ninety thousand, three hundred sixty thousand, and seven hundred eighty thousand.

Within the time it takes for a joss stick to burn, the price of the weapon nourished by a high level Pangu warrior rose more than ten times. The bidding price swiftly reached seventy eight thousand.

But even the astronomical price after the ten fold increase couldn’t stop the alien races from bidding. They continued to raise their paddles one after another, attempting to snatch the weapon.

Li Yunmu’s heart rate also increased a few times, and he almost couldn’t resist joining the competition. After all, even if he didn’t need this weapon, he could give it to his followers upon his return. This weapon would definitely increase their destructive power by a few notches.

And even if it wasn’t useful to his followers, he could give it to the most powerful ape god which would greatly increase its strength. But after he thought about it, he chose to suppress the urge to join.

In the end, he needed all his resources to get his hands on Pangu True Armor.

Finally, a person from the Sound race became the final winner and won the Pangu blade for the price of one million eighty thousand sacred pangu coins.

“Oh, I hadn’t expected people from Sound to have also come.”

When Wang Ren saw this scene, his expression became slightly ugly.

“Is there some problem with them?”

In terms of knowledge about alien races of the Origin World, Li Yunmu was far surpassed by Wang Ren, this ordinary human.

After all, once Wang Ren joined Pangu City as a teacher to instruct the young ones, his life had transformed. He received preferential treatment and special privilege while also gaining access to the library of the institute. There, he could examine many records hoarded by the Pangu about the history of the Origin World.

Li Yunmu saw Wang Ren, who was only an ordinary person among humans, in a new light.

According to the large amount of data collected in the system’s database, Sound people didn’t possess eye-catching strength among the more than thousand races in the Origin World. In fact, they were even in the lower layer.

Regardless of whether it was their comprehensive or individual strength, both of them were extremely weak. Yet Wang Ren acted rather apprehensive of this cace, which astonished Li Yunmu.

“Benefactor might not know this, but these people can manufacture musical instruments with the best sound quality, even if they don’t possess great strength. As long the instrument is manufactured by them, it would fetch an astronomical price in any corner of the world. That is why it could be said that they are walking treasuries. They are extremely wealthy…”

While explaining it, Wang Ren sighed deeply.

As if influenced, Li Yunmu’s gaze fell on the few Sound clansmen standing by the side of the Pangu Blade. After a careful observation, his brows creased.

At first glance, the two women fit perfectly with the data gathered by the system; they were extremely weak.

There couldn’t be any comparison with the formidable Pangu, for the two women from Sound weren’t much stronger than ordinary humans. Even with the system’s secret scan, Li Yunmu still found it hard to believe that neither of them possessed any cultivation.

Their individual strength was tantamount to a physical flux expert possessing a strength of fifteen oxen.

Li Yunmu was instantly amazed by it. God only knew how a race which was extremely weak but adept at excavating wealth manage to exist without trouble among the countless lifeforms in the Origin World.

Wang Ren seemed to have already sensed Li Yunmu’s suspicion, for he added, “Benefactor mustn’t think of them as someone weak and easily bullied. In reality, there aren’t many who would dare to touch them. Even the hosts of this auction Pangu may not be brave enough to covet their wealth.”

“Eh? Why is that?”

Li Yunmu’s brows jumped.

“It’s very simple—they are one of the alien races given asylum by the Deus. As long as a person’s brain isn’t filled with melon seeds, they won’t think about laying a hand on Sound people. Benefactor should pay attention to that bird man standing near one of the women,” Wang Ren said softly.

The presence of that alien race person was extremely mediocre. If Wang Ren hadn’t pointed him out, Li Yunmu might’ve ignored him completely.

But because of this exact reason, Li Yunmu suddenly let out a deep sigh. It was truly strange that he had completely ignored this bird man previously.

chapters.title: Chapter 531 - The Lack Of Food Supplies
chapters.body:
Chapter 531 - The Lack Of Food Supplies

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

After focusing on him, Li Yunmu noticed that the bird man’s outer appearance was quite different from that of humans; he had snow-white wings on his back. Regardless of wherever he went, they were bound to attract attention.

However, even with such a conspicuous appearance, Li Yunmu had subconsciously overlooked him. If Wang Ren hadn’t pointed him out, Li Yunmu may have ignored him for the whole auction

This was extremely strange.

At that moment, Li Yunmu finally understood what was strange. The man was meticulously emitting a formless pressure to make people meticulously neglect his presence.

Even if Li Yunmu’s perception had increased recently and he possessed a keen intuition, he still couldn’t escape the birdman’s influence and subconsciously overlook his existence.

“What race does he belong to?” Li Yunmu enquired in a deadpan voice.

“Eh, if the records collected by the successive generations of Pangu aren’t wrong, he should be a Deus.”

While saying that, Wang Ren subsciously lowered his voice to the extreme.

Clearly, even if he was just an ordinary person who didn’t understand cultivators’ power levels, he was was still afraid of the Deus.

“Him…”

Li Yunmu was extremely astonished when he heard Wang Ren’s words.

Not long ago, Li Yunmu had learned that Deus was the most formidable race among the thousand races of the Origin World and that they hadn’t appeared in the world for a long time. They were said to live in the clouds. high above the world.

Under the gravitational pull of the Origin World, it wasn’t easy to step foot above the clouds when compared to Earth.

Even if a sage flux expert possessed the strength to fly, the greatest height which their strength allowed them to reach was around three kilometers above ground.

But this was far below the altitude of clouds. Yet each member of the most formidable race, the Deus, could live above the clouds. This clearly showed just how terrifying they were.

But the legendary Deus were said to not have come down for a long time. Yet Wang Ren guessed that the alien race person which resembled a bird man was surprisingly a legendary Deus?

With Wang Ren’s explanation though, he gradually understood the meaning behind the status provided to the people of Sound.

Wang Ren had learned from the records in the library that the reason why the Deus provided asylum to the Sound was mainly because their women were one of the companions of Deus for breeding and producing descendants.

Sound people actually used a Matrilineal system.

In each year’s festival of the Sound, a large number of girls who had recently entered adulthood would come out. The best of them who surpassed others in all aspects would then be delivered to Deus. They would become vessels for sowing seeds for the next generation of the Deus.

Because of this, the weak Sound people were one of the few who received asylum from the Deus.

According to Wang Ren’s explanation, every member of the Deus possessed an extremely tyrannical bloodline which made it extremely difficult to produce offspring among themselves.

Apart from the Sound, who had become the target for sowing next generation’s seeds, there were three more races who received the same treatment.

After hearing Wang Ren’s words, Li Yunmu couldn’t help but feel sorrow for the weak race. He clearly understood why races like the Sound would basically take the initiative to offer their most beautiful, pure, and outstanding women to the Deus. It was all to ensure the continuous survival of their race.

Clearly, the woman who had a Deus protecting her wasn’t an ordinary one.

She was likely to be someone who carried an offspring of the Deus. Otherwise, she wouldn’t deserve the personal protection of a Deus standing guard by her side.

But even after Wang Ren’s explanations, Li Yunmu still couldn’t feel the bird man’s existence nor could get a feel about his strength.

He couldn’t see through him, he still couldn’t see through him.

Li Yunmu secretly used a few tricks, but he still couldn’t see through the Deus. Instead, the other party seemed to have sensed his actions and began to check his surroundings in confusion.

Li Yunmu was slightly astonished and quickly withdrew his probing tricks.

From that moment, he became even more certain that the birdman who didn’t seem to possess even a single iota of power was frighteningly formidable.

Even if Li Yunmu possessed the Azure Dragon Expert Armor which had allowed his combat strength to leap to the point that he could battle sage flux experts, he still couldn’t match up to the birdman.

Like a bird startled by a mere twang of a bow, Li Yunmu withdrew his thoughts and no longer spied on the other party. Even if given his strength he could be counted among the powerhouses of the Origin World, he still wasn’t powerful enough to stand against the Deus who were the most powerful of the thousand races.

Pangu City’s auction continued after the first sale. The second item to be auctioned also left Li Yunmu completely startled.

It was another weapon of Pangu which didn’t lose to the previous blade.

It had also been nourished by a high level Pangu warrior for more than thirty years and was also a nine-patterned weapon. Moreover, while following the high level Pangu warrior for many years, it had drank the blood of many formidable lifeforms and had transformed into a baleful weapon.

When such a rare weapon which excited many people was brought out, it was foreordained that there would be a fierce competition to acquire it.

The hatchet finally sold for one million three hundred eighty thousand pangu sacred coins and was obtained by the formidable Ba Wang. Li Yunmu thought about competing for a few times, but in the end, he suppressed that urge once more.

Yet the following nine items in the auction were all surprisingly nine- and ten-patterned pangu weapons, which caused many people to feel that something was odd.

Could the food have grown so scarce that year that they didn’t hesitate to even auction so many of their customized weapons?

Although no sage grade weapons had appeared, the auctioning of several nine- and ten-patterned ordinary grade weapons was already an event which happened only once in a century.

After all, which of the ten ordinary grade weapons hadn’t been nourished by a high level Pangu warrior for at least ten years? Probably even the Pangu soldiers couldn’t get ahold of them, so where could they find a surplus to sell to outsiders?

And yet the Pangu had auctioned off ten such weapons for food. It reflected just how horrible was the food situation that year.

After the bidders obtained the ten Pangu weapons, the auction entered the free sale segment.

During it, the Pangu wouldn’t be officiating the auction, but would allow the people who had come from all around the world to take out their valuable possessions and auction them.

Originally, Li Yunmu had believed that after sell-off of the treasures from the treasury of Black Spirit Valley, he possessed sufficient funds to fight in the grand finale of the auction. But after seeing people from Sound as well as all sorts of other powerful races, he no longer had the confidence to win.

Thus, he thought for a while and decided to take out the ten treasure maps which were comparatively useless to him and auction them off systematically in the free sale segment.

chapters.title: Chapter 532 - Problems With Treasure Maps
chapters.body:
Chapter 532 - Problems With Treasure Maps

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Li Yunmu took out the ten secret treasure maps. Four of them showed the way to dimensional spaces which he hadn’t yet explored, another four detailed the exact geographical location of spirit ingredients, while the last two were for special minerals.

These were the maps which were relatively less useful to him or with which he could bear to part from the twenty something treasure maps he’d obtained from the treasury. Otherwise, he wouldn’t have taken them to auction and would have instead went to explore them.

Once the ten secret treasure maps were announced, they caused quite an uproar among the bidders.

It was especially so for the four maps which contained the location and details regarding four unexplored dimensional spaces. They attracted the eyes of many alien races. After all, no one would ever complain that they possessed too many dimensional spaces.

Regardless of whether it was a first tier or a third tier power, all of them wanted the discovered yet unexploited dimensional spaces which also included the access to all the resources in them.

Moreover, the four maps of the dimensional spaces didn’t have many details apart from the known concrete geographical location.

From that, they could guess that the dimensional spaces in the four maps probably possessed a lot of valuable space. This fact was certain to drive the prices up.

The four dimensional spaces which hadn’t been explored yet, how much area did they have?

Similarly, no one knew what grade of uncommon materials or resources could be found within the four unexplored dimensional spaces.

They also couldn’t tell what sort of rare lifeforms would exist there. There was the question if life was even possible in those dimensional spaces.

Because of that, the value of the four dimensional space maps was relatively volatile. If there was no buyer who urgently needed private space, then the insufficient information would lower the prices because the buyers wouldn’t want to risk their wealth.

But if someone did urgently need more space, the prices could swell to extreme heights. It was all because they possessed unlimited possibilities.

There was a chance that they only had a small area and were barren lands in which even the simplest lifeforms couldn’t exist.

But at the same time, it was also possible that the dimensional spaces were extremely large and were filled with an astonishing amount of resources. They may beven contain extremely high grade material.

Thus, after the Pangu Auction House received Li Yunmu’s ten secret treasure maps, it kept dawdling for a long time. Only after a while did they determine a comparatively reasonable price.

“I have ten secret treasure maps in my hand: four of them were determined to be B grade, four C grade, and the last two C grade as well.”

Before the auction master had even finished speaking, he attracted an uproar. Many buyers began talking in whispers.

Once Pangu sold several nine-patterned basic weapons to the outsiders, the level of the auction had been raised to an extremely high grade.

But when the crowd heard that surprisingly four B grade secret treasure maps were about to be auction, the people filled with great interest and expectations.

Even if the maps were only classified as B grade, the items of this level held quite an enormous potential for benefit in the Origin World.

“Do these four maps contain the location of unexplored dimensional spaces?”

Someone underneath the stage couldn’t help but guess.

“That’s right. They are precisely that—maps which contain the location of unexplored dimensional spaces. The most recent information in the maps is from forty-five days ago. Alright, I will now announce the information about the first map.

“The first unexplored dimensional space is located south of Baidi City in the Eastern Region. The area of the dimensional space is unknown and the quality of resources inside is also unknown. The grade of lifeforms in the dimensional space is unknown too, so the base price is three million sacred pangu coins. Every bid must be hundred thousand sacred pangu coins higher than the last bid. The bidding starts now.”

Although Pangu had learned how to make an auction from humans, their style was extremely crude and direct.

Once the prices were announced, they started the auction without wasting any time.

However, the base price caused many people to turn silent. Originally, the crowd was filled with excitement and expectations, but it had instantly turned still.

All information unknown? Last reliable news from forty-five days ago? Three million sacred pangu coins as base price?

Each one of the above mentioned information dampened the fervent excitement in most people. Buying that map was equal to gambling.

Even if there was no detailed information about the size of the dimensional space, it would have still been all right. But if the level of lifeforms inside was completely unknown, many people would instantly want to examine carefully whether their group or power had the strength required to exploit the resources.

The gamble which relied on spending a lot of money to obtain a dimensional space about which no one knew anything was extremely risky. If the dimensional space was in ruins, it would be a great loss.

It made people worry, especially when they heard that the last valid information was from forty-five days ago.

What did this signify?

It meant that the owner had stopped keeping track of the dimensional space. A period of one and a half month could be considered as very long or very short.

If during that time the dimensional space had been discovered and exploited by other people, what would happen then? It would be a disastrous loss.

Because of the above mentioned reasons, the bidders’ enthusiasm immediately cooled off.

At this time, Li Yunmu tensed up slightly.

Originally, he hadn’t intended to take those maps out for auction. Before, he’d thought that even if he couldn’t explore them for the time being, he would rather let them rot in his hands than sell any unexplored dimensional spaces.

After all, once he explored them and was acknowledged as their master, he could do as he wished. Even if he chose to auction them, their price wouldn’t be as low as a few millions. It would shoot up to ten or maybe even a hundred times higher amount.

If the dimensional space he encountered was large, possessed a lot of resources, and was livable, it was possible that the prices would swell more than a thousand times.

After all, it would also included the prices of all the resources in the dimensional space.

However, Li Yunmu wanted to get his hands on the Pangu True Armor, so he didn’t make any bids on other items and even took out his precious maps to auction with great unwillingness.

If he’d known it would come to that, he would have taken them out for auction earlier, when the date of the last check up was closer. The base price wouldn’t have been so low then.

chapters.title: Chapter 533 - Auctioning Maps
chapters.body:
Chapter 533 - Auctioning Maps

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy

Translation

“Three million five hundred thousand.”

Although nothing was known about the dimensional space and the last information was from forty-five days ago, one of the several alien races couldn’t help but take the bite.

“It’s someone from the Devil Scorpion.”

The bidder’s alien race was Devil Scorpion. Its comprehensive strength was lay in the middle of the thousand races.

Li Yunmu followed the bidder’s voice with a hopeful gaze and couldn’t help but be slightly astounded.

The man’s appearance startled him a bit. God only knew what sort hardcore taste the deities of ancient times had to have created such an alien race.

Li Yunmu had to accept that the appearance of the Devil Scorpions was somewhat astonishing.

It fit well with their name. On first glance, he could see that they were an extreme combination of human and scorpion. They possessed the arms and legs of humans, but were covered in scorpion armor from top to bottom. At their backs was a long and thick tail similar to that of a black scorpion. Even their faces were covered with densely packed scales.

Li Yunmu couldn’t dare to imagine how the deities of ancient times had thought of creating such a bloodline from the combination of humans and monsters.

But although his shock wasn’t small, their classification as an alien race wasn’t without reason.

With their knowledge, culture, and society, they were clearly similar to humans. Although their appearance was that of monsters, they could still be considered as a civilized race.

“So the Devil Scorpions are bidding. But then again, it isn’t a surprise since their main base is located near Baidi City. It’s worth it for them.”

Soon, someone gave a quick introduction of Devil Scorpions.

Although the auctioneer had publicly announced the treasure map’s geographical location, the Origin World was a vast place. The southern side of Baidi City of Eastern Region was an extremely huge region.

Without the precise location, trying to find the dimensional space’s location was tantamount to looking for a needle in a haystack.

This was why Li Yunmu had allowed the Pangu official to share this information. As a matter of fact, wasn’t it precisely because of the rough geographical location that he had encountered a local bidder who desired it greatly?

“Three million eight hundred thousand.”

Although the auction began with an awkward silence, the moment Baidi City’s local power Devil Scorpions made a bid, another person made the next bid.

This one didn’t come from one of the alien races, but rather a masked human powerhouse. Based on the presence coming from the man’s body, he was a late stage sage flux expert.

Such a formidable human powerhouse instantly attracted the attention of many people.

A super powerhouse with the strength of a late stage sage flux expert in the Origin World wasn’t like Earth’s domain sages.

Based on the comparison of power levels among the two worlds, this human powerhouse’s strength was comparable to that of the invincible battle sages. Even among the thousand races of the Origin World, this was enough to call the person a powerhouse.

Pangu True Armour had attracted many characters with terrifying strength which instantly pressured Li Yunmu even more.

Even with his comprehensive combat strength, he might be able to battle and flee from a mid stage sage flux expert, but he was still quite far away from battling a battle sage level character.

This disparity was similar to the difference between domain and battle sages on Earth. Although it was just a difference of a minor realm, the former couldn’t put up any resistance against the latter in a life and death battle.

But despite that, the Devil Scorpions didn’t have any great apprehensions toward the late stage sage flux expert. One of their people clenched his teeth and announced the bid of four million.

Instantly, most of the people on the scene began to ponder. A glimmer of light flashed through the eyes of many.

The abnormal behavior of Devil Scorpions and their strong desire to compete caused the hypothesis of many people to become stronger. None of the characters present in the auction were idiots.

Since the Devil Scorpions who had their base near Baidi City thirsted for the secret treasure map, it answered many of their questions.

They were now certain that the information about the dimensional space was still useful. If it had been discovered by someone else, would the Devil Scorpions bother to compete in the bidding?

The answer was no.

Thus, the auction of the treasure map about which many people weren’t optimistic grew exciting all of a sudden.

In a flash, many bidders who were originally watching silently joined the competition.

Five million, five million three hundred thousand, six million, seven million, finally the bid reached twelve million sacred pangu coins.

Li Yunmu was quite surprised by this price. Even an idiot could understand form this that the dimensional space at the location provided in the map was definitely an extremely valuable one.

In the end, the secret treasure map was bought by the reckless Devil Scorpions who had started the bidding for the outrageous price of eighteen million sacred pangu coins.

It caused an uproar, and everyone’s eyes filled with various thoughts.

As for the seller Li Lunmu, he now clearly understood that the dimensional space shown in the treasure map was of great value. The Devil Scorpions seemed to know about it from some private records, but… he still didn’t regret selling it to them.

The reason for that was quite simple, and it was that even the most valuable dimensional space couldn’t compare to the increase of his personal strength in importance.

As long as he possessed the right amount of strength, what sort of benefit could he not snatch?

This was analogous to the situation a while ago. If Li Yunmu hadn’t gained the substantial boost in strength from the innate expert armor, it would’ve been more or less impossible for him to single-handedly kill his way across a third tier power.

Without that, how could he have been able to come to Pangu City and trade away the astonishing treasures?

Soon, the eighteen million sacred pangu coins flowed into Li Yunmu’s hands, increasing his chances to get his hands on the true armor.

After that, the nine other secret treasure maps were sold in succession one after another.

The second map was auctioned for four million five hundred thousand sacred pangu coins, the third map was sold for seven million sacred pangu coins, while the fourth map was passed upon.

Even if its base price was the lowest of the four, only one million three hundred thousand, not one person made any bid for it.

Li Yunmu couldn’t understand it at first, but Wang Ren’s explanation quickly cleared everything up.

It wasn’t that the location specified in the treasure map wasn’t valuable, but that everyone was extremely fearful of the consequences if they dared to go there.

The location specified in the map was in the territory of Luo Devils.

What sort of alien race were these Luo Devils?

If truth was told, Li Yunmu wasn’t too familiar with this extremely formidable alien race which loved to war. If went to enquire about them from the people of other formidable races, he would have learned that they were all extremely apprehensive of Luo Devils.

And the dimensional space of the fourth map was located right in their territory. This explained why even if the map had the lowest price, no one dared to bit for it.

After all, no one wanted their dimensional space to be located in the territory of that formidable and savage alien race.
